movie.actors: Ioan Gruffudd, Jessica Alba, Chris Evans, Michael Chiklis
movie.plot: The Fantastic Four learn that they aren't the only super-powered beings in the universe when they square off against the powerful Silver Surfer and the planet-eating Galactus.
movie.title: Fantastic 4: Rise of the Silver Surfer
movie.writer: Don Payne (screenplay), Mark Frost (screenplay), John Turman (story), Mark Frost (story), Stan Lee (characters), Jack Kirby (characters)
